name: Color Road!
core_loop: Steer a rolling ball along a track, matching its color with obstacles to pass through while avoiding mismatched colors and collecting coins.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers of all ages looking for quick, reflex-based gameplay.
visual_style: Minimalist 3D with abstract geometric shapes and a soft pastel background.

palette.description: High contrast between the dark track and soft pastel background, with bright, saturated colors for interactive elements.
